ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the movie production */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company that produced the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "gross" INTEGER /* Total box office gross of the movie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "released" TEXT /* Release date of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score of the movie based on user ratings */,
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the main star of the movie */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of user votes for the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the writer of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise the movie belongs to */,
  "sequel_id" TEXT /* Reference to the sequel or prequel of the movie */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current status of the movie (e.g., pre-production, production, post-production, released) */,
  "distributor_id" TEXT /* Reference to the distributor of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie plot */,
  "box_office_performance" TEXT /* Overall box office performance metrics (e.g., opening weekend, lifetime gross) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when production ended */,
  "release_date_international" TEXT /* International release date */,
  "country_of_origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of origin of the movie */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget */,
  "gross_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the gross revenue */,
  "awards_count" INTEGER /* Number of awards won by the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_country_of_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_of_origin_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_rating FOREIGN KEY ("rating") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_sequel_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_id") REFERENCES sequels ("sequel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_star_id FOREIGN KEY ("star_id") REFERENCES stars ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the production company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., production, distribution) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "star_name" TEXT /* Full name of the star */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the star */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the star */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "age_restriction" TEXT /* Age restriction for the rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the movie was released */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from the box office */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date in the country */,
  "opening_weekend_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated in the opening weekend */,
  "lifetime_revenue" INTEGER /* Total revenue generated from the box office */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review (if applicable) */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the rating (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user (e.g., for critics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user rating */,
  "relevance" TEXT /* Relevance of the review (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES user_ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Director, Best Actor) */,
  "awarding_body" TEXT /* Body that awarded the award (e.g., Academy Awards, Cannes Film Festival) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequels" (
  "sequel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequel record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original movie */,
  "sequel_movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequel or prequel movie */,
  "sequel_type" TEXT /* Type of sequel (e.g., direct sequel, prequel, spin-off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequels_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequels_sequel_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequel_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the franchise */,
  "franchise_type" TEXT /* Type of franchise (e.g., standalone, series) */,
  "franchise_status" TEXT /* Current status of the franchise (e.g., active, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)
